AI Offroad Setup Assistant

Vehicle setup guidance for real trails

RigAI - AI Offroad Setup Assistant

Find the right tires, suspension, lift and recovery gear for your vehicle, budget and driving style.

Get Started View Demo Setup
Vehicle Budget Terrain Experience

How RigAI Helps

Clear recommendations without guesswork.

01

Beginner-friendly explanations

Plain-language guidance that explains tradeoffs before recommending parts.

02

Budget-based recommendations

Setup ideas are shaped around what the driver actually wants to spend.

03

Tire and suspension matching

RigAI helps match tire size, lift height and suspension comfort goals.

04

Overland and offroad setup planning

Plan upgrades for daily driving, weekend trails or longer overland trips.

Example Recommendation

A practical setup, not a random product list.

Demo recommendation Toyota 4Runner

Comfort overland setup with 285 AT tires, 2 inch lift and budget-based recommendations.

Vehicle Toyota 4Runner
Use case Daily city driving + weekend overlanding
Budget $3,000-$4,000

Recommended setup

  • 285/70R17 all-terrain tires
  • 2 inch comfort lift
  • Upgraded rear springs
  • Recovery kit
  • Portable air compressor

Product links may include affiliate links. RigAI may earn a commission from qualifying purchases.

Built for Different Drivers

From first upgrades to long-range travel.

Beginner

Learn what matters before buying your first offroad upgrades.

Daily driver

Keep comfort, road manners and reliability in the recommendation.

Weekend offroader

Balance trail capability with a setup that still works Monday morning.

Overland traveler

Plan around load, range, recovery needs and longer routes.

Affiliate Disclosure

Recommendations first. Affiliate links second.

RigAI may participate in affiliate programs, including Amazon Associates and other offroad equipment affiliate programs. When users click product links and make purchases, RigAI may earn a commission at no additional cost to the user. Recommendations are based on vehicle setup, budget and use case.

As an Amazon Associate, RigAI earns from qualifying purchases.

Privacy Policy Contact: support@rigai.app Affiliate Disclosure
